E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

ACC L47 V1.1

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 75D
Recv ID: 77D
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 24
Func Name: ACC

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "DH7",
    "soft": "0000",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

[

    "dtctype": 2,

    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "MoreDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Current Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Standard Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
